Operation 'post_item_initiate_single_merchant_id' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary was empty, making it impossible for AI agents to understand the operation's purpose. Description lacked clarity on inputs (PayableItem structure), outputs (URLSet response), and the distinction from batch processing. Enhanced summary provides concise action-oriented statement. Improved description specifies input schema, output structure, and clarifies the single-item vs. batch distinction for better AI agent routing.

data.current_description: This service is mainly useful to initiate a payment and actively redirect the browser to the payment page. As such, a payment session is initiated and persisted in OPG.  Not intended for batch processing.
data.summary_suggestion: Initiate single payment and redirect to payment page
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a single payment session for the specified merchant and returns a payment-initiation URL to redirect the browser to the payment page. The payment session is persisted in OPG for tracking and status management. Accepts a single PayableItem in the request body. Returns a URLSet containing the payment-initiation URL. Not intended for batch processing; use the batch endpoint for multiple items.
data.reasoning: Original summary was empty, making it impossible for AI agents to understand the operation's purpose. Description lacked clarity on inputs (PayableItem structure), outputs (URLSet response), and the distinction from batch processing. Enhanced summary provides concise action-oriented statement. Improved description specifies input schema, output structure, and clarifies the single-item vs. batch distinction for better AI agent routing.

message: Operation 'post_item_initiate_merchant_id' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, unclear_purpose. Original summary was empty, preventing AI agents from quickly understanding the batch processing capability. Description used imprecise language ('provided to generate') and had a typo (two identical payment-status URLs listed). Enhanced summary clearly indicates batch processing capability. Improved description specifies input schema (RequestPayableItems array), clarifies the three distinct URL purposes with practical use cases, and uses more precise action-oriented language for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: This service is provided to generate a batch of URLs. Per payable item, three URLs are returned:  (1) The payment-initiation URL, (2) A payment-status URL, and (3) A payment-status URL, pointing to a image representation.  The purpose is oriented towards (batch) preparation of outbound emails or static web screens.
data.summary_suggestion: Generate batch payment initiation URLs for multiple items
data.description_suggestion: Generates a batch of payment-initiation URLs for multiple payable items. For each item in the RequestPayableItems array, returns a URLSet containing three URLs: (1) payment-initiation URL for redirecting users to the payment page, (2) payment-status URL for checking payment status, and (3) payment-status image URL for embedding status indicators in emails or web pages. Designed for batch preparation of outbound communications and static web content.
data.reasoning: Original summary was empty, preventing AI agents from quickly understanding the batch processing capability.
